name: Landrich Holding Limited
summary: Landrich Holding Limited undertakes construction works in Hong Kong. It is involved in the construction of trunk roads, carriageways, bridges, and tunnels, as well as modification of existing roads that include landscaping works, laying of pipes, and manhole construction. The company also engages in the clearance of construction site, demolition of existing structures, reduction and stabilization of existing slopes, and associated work; and establishment of fill tank for the storage of public fill materials arising from construction activities. In addition, it is involved in the construction of buildings, primarily structural steel works, and transportation and heavy lifting works, as well as construction of reinforced concrete structures. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong.
